basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Associate-I, Project Associate-II Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Project Associate-I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Project Associate-II: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Gol Norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT/ECE/EEE or equivalent with preferable M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent. Project Associate-II requires 2 years of experience.
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT/ECE/EEE or equivalent with preferable M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent. Minimum 60% or 6.5CGPA in UG and PG from a recognized University/ Institute. 0 years of experience required. Project Associate-II: B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT/ECE/EEE or equivalent with preferable M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent. Minimum 60% or 6.5CGPA in UG and PG from a recognized University/ Institute. 2 years of experience required.

salary_details.pay_scale: Project Associate-I: Rs. 25,000 (Consolidated), Project Associate-II: Rs. 35,000 (Consolidated)
salary_details.details: Project Associate-I: Rs. 25,000 (Consolidated) Project Associate-II: Rs. 35,000 (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Trichy Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Trichy to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Trichy Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT/ECE/EEE or equivalent with preferable M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent. Minimum 60% or 6.5CGPA in UG and PG from a recognized University/ Institute. 0 years of experience required. Project Associate-II: B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT/ECE/EEE or equivalent with preferable M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent. Minimum 60% or 6.5CGPA in UG and PG from a recognized University/ Institute. 2 years of experience required.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Project Associate-II: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Gol Norms.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: Rs. 25,000 (Consolidated) Project Associate-II: Rs. 35,000 (Consolidated)

rows.event: Last date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Trichy Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Trichy to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NIT Trichy Project Associate posts is 15th July 2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: For Project Associate-I, candidates need a B.E/B.Tech in CSE/IT/ECE/EEE or equivalent, with a preference for M.E/M.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent. A minimum of 60% or 6.5 CGPA in UG and PG is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for Project Associate-II?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Project Associate-II position, candidates are required to have 2 years of relevant work experience in addition to the educational qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for both Project Associate-I and Project Associate-II positions is less than 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for Project Associate-I is Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Project Associate-II?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for Project Associate-II is Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the NIT Trichy recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online by submitting the scanned copy of their duly filled application along with supporting documents as a single document via the provided Google Form link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test, if deemed necessary, followed by an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please ensure you check both carefully before applying.
